request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While we're tied up in endless debates about alliance commitments, our borders are becoming more vulnerable. Last year alone, intelligence reports show a 30% increase in cross-border threats. Meanwhile, some politicians are pushing to reduce our defense cooperation, leaving us exposed. We can't afford to weaken our alliances while threats grow. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrongerTogether
